File: `src/app/pages/admin/admin.component.ts`
Selector: `app-admin`
Standalone: yes

- `data: DataService`
- `draft: Product = this.emptyProduct()`

- `submitted: unknown = false`
- `success: unknown = false`

- `clear(): void`
- `edit(product: Product): void`
- `emptyProduct(): Product`
- `invalid(controlName: string): boolean`

- `save(): void`
- `valid(controlName: string): boolean`

## Services / Injectables

### DataService

File: `src/app/services/data.service.ts`
providedIn: `root`

Description: Centraliza los datos simulados de Equi-Fiber en localStorage. Permite demostrar autenticacion por roles, carrito, inventario y compras sin backend real.

Properties:
- `cart: unknown = this.load<CartItem[]>('cart', [])`
- `currency: unknown = new Intl.NumberFormat('es-CL', { style: 'currency', currency: 'CLP', maximumFractionDigits: 0 })`
- `orders: unknown = this.load<Order[]>('orders', [])`
- `products: unknown = this.load<Product[]>('products', initialProducts)`
- `session: unknown = this.load<Session | null>('session', null)`
- `users: unknown = this.load<User[]>('users', [adminUser])`

Methods:
- `addToCart(id: string): void` — Agrega un producto al carrito respetando el stock disponible.
- `changeQty(id: string, delta: number): void`
- `createOrder(): void` — Crea una orden con pago simulado, descuenta inventario y vacia el carrito.
- `format(value: number): string`
- `load(key: string, fallback: T): T`
- `login(email: string, password: string): boolean` — Valida credenciales locales y redirige segun el rol del usuario.
- `logout(): void`
- `persistCart(): void`
- `persistOrders(): void`
- `persistProducts(): void`
- `persistSession(): void`
- `persistUsers(): void`
- `register(user: User): boolean`
- `save(key: string, value: unknown): void`

## Guards

### adminGuard

File: `src/app/guards/auth.guard.ts`

Description: Limita los mantenedores al rol administrador.

### authGuard

File: `src/app/guards/auth.guard.ts`

Description: Protege paginas internas que requieren una sesion iniciada.

## Interfaces

### CartItem

File: `src/app/services/data.service.ts`

Properties:
- `id: string`
- `name: string`
- `price: number`
- `qty: number`

### Order

File: `src/app/services/data.service.ts`

Properties:
- `date: string`
- `email: string`
- `id: string`
- `items: CartItem[]`
- `status: string`
- `total: number`

### Product

File: `src/app/services/data.service.ts`

Properties:
- `desc: string`
- `id: string`
- `name: string`
- `price: number`
- `stock: number`

### Session

File: `src/app/services/data.service.ts`

Properties:
- `email: string`
- `role: string`

### User

File: `src/app/services/data.service.ts`

Properties:
- `address: string`
- `email: string`
- `horse: string`
- `name: string`
- `password: string`
- `phone: string`
- `role: string`
- `rut: string`

  Defined in `src/app/services/data.service.ts`

- `initialProducts: Product[] = [ { id: 'bolsa-120', name: 'Equi-Fiber Bolsa 120 g', price: 2990, stock: 42, desc: 'Bolsa con 6 snacks de 20 g, alto en fibra, sin azucar anadida, con linaza y …`
  Defined in `src/app/services/data.service.ts`

  Defined in `src/app/app.routes.ts`
